pages.text:
​F] Multilingual Ability​
​1. Chemical Formula of Water​
​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​H₂O​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“H2O”​
​●​
​“पानी का सूत्र H₂O है”​
​2. Capital of India​
​Question Translation: भारत की राजधानी क्या है?​
​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​New Delhi​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“नई दिल्ली”​
​●​
​“Delhi”​​(partial but may get partial credit depending on strictness)​
​3. Fill in the Blank​
​Question: सूर्य ______ दिशा में उगता है।​
​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​पूर्व (East)​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“East”​
​●​
​“Purv”​
​4. Newton’s Second Law​
​Ideal Answer (Short Form):​
​●​
​Force = mass × acceleration​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“F = ma”​
​●​
​“बल = द्रव्यमान × त्वरण”​
​●​
​“Force is equal to mass times acceleration”​
​5. Simple Addition​
​Question: 5 + 7​

raw_text:
​F] Multilingual Ability​
​1. Chemical Formula of Water​
​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​H₂O​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“H2O”​
​●​
​“पानी का सूत्र H₂O है”​
​2. Capital of India​
​Question Translation: भारत की राजधानी क्या है?​
​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​New Delhi​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“नई दिल्ली”​
​●​
​“Delhi”​​(partial but may get partial credit depending on strictness)​
​3. Fill in the Blank​
​Question: सूर्य ______ दिशा में उगता है।​
​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​पूर्व (East)​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“East”​
​●​
​“Purv”​
​4. Newton’s Second Law​
​Ideal Answer (Short Form):​
​●​
​Force = mass × acceleration​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“F = ma”​
​●​
​“बल = द्रव्यमान × त्वरण”​
​●​
​“Force is equal to mass times acceleration”​
​5. Simple Addition​
​Question: 5 + 7​

​Ideal Answer:​
​●​
​12​
​Acceptable Variations:​
​●​
​“बारह”​
​●​
​“twelve”​
